About Us

About FHA Mortgages Florida

We're dedicated FHA loan specialists helping Florida buyers and homeowners access affordable, low-down-payment financing across all 67 counties.

Get My Free Rate QuoteCall __PHONE_DISPLAY__
FHA specialistsAll 67 countiesFast pre-approvalsEqual Housing Lender

Get your free FHA quote

No obligation. See your rate & payment in minutes.

🔒 Your information is secure. By submitting you agree to be contacted about FHA loan options. This is not a commitment to lend.

Thank you!

An FHA mortgage specialist will reach out shortly with your personalized Florida rate quote.

About Us

Florida's FHA loan specialists

PLACEHOLDER — replace the bracketed details with your real company information (years in business, NMLS#, address, team size). Accurate, verifiable business details build the trust that both customers and Google reward.

FHA Mortgages Florida is a [Florida-based] mortgage [broker/lender] focused on helping home buyers and homeowners across all 67 Florida counties access affordable FHA financing. We specialize in FHA loans — from 3.5%-down purchases for first-time buyers to streamline refinances and 203(k) renovation loans.

What we do

We guide you through every step: pre-approval, comparing FHA options, locking a competitive rate, and getting to the closing table. Because FHA is our focus, we know the program's details cold — county loan limits, mortgage insurance, condo approvals, and how to pair FHA with Florida down payment assistance.

Why work with us

Fast pre-approvals, clear answers, and deep knowledge of the Florida market. We serve buyers from Miami to Jacksonville to the Panhandle, and we treat your goals — not the transaction — as the point.

Our commitment

We do business in accordance with the Federal Fair Housing Law and the Equal Credit Opportunity Act. We're committed to honest, transparent guidance and to helping more Floridians achieve homeownership.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What areas of Florida do you serve?+
We serve home buyers and homeowners in all 67 Florida counties, including Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Orlando, Tampa, Jacksonville, Naples, and the Panhandle.
Are you a mortgage broker or a lender?+
[Specify broker or lender and NMLS#.] We focus on FHA financing and guide you from pre-approval through closing.
What types of FHA loans do you offer?+
FHA purchase loans, FHA Streamline and cash-out refinances, and FHA 203(k) renovation loans, plus guidance on pairing FHA with Florida down payment assistance.
How do I get started?+
Request a free, no-obligation quote through our form or call us, and an FHA specialist will review your goals and options.
